outputs.description: The ID of the job found by the search. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.status The status of the job found by the search.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.job_id

outputs.description: The device ID that is guaranteed to be unique within each PSC environment. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_username The user names related to the process.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.device_id

outputs.description: Date A date/time field formatted as an ISO-8601 string based on the UTC timezone. For example, device_timestamp:2018-03-14T21:06:45.183Z. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.childproc_count
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.backend_timestamp

outputs.description: The cumulative count of child-process creations since process tracking started. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.crossproc_count The cumulative count of cross-process events since process tracking started.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The ID of the sensor group where the device belongs. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.device_name The name of the device.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.device_group_id

outputs.description: The ID of the policy applied to the device. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.device_timestamp Date
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.device_policy_id

outputs.description: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.enriched True if the process document came from the CBD data stream. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.enriched_event_type
outputs.name: The time displayed on the sensor based on the sensor’s clock. The time is an ISO-8601 formatted time string based on the UTC timezone.

outputs.description: The CBD enriched event type. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.event_type The CBD event type (valid only for events coming through analytics). Possible values are: CREATE_PROCESS, DATA_ACCESS, FILE_CREATE, INJECT_CODE, NETWORK, POLICY_ACTION, REGISTRY_ACCESS, and SYSTEM_API_CALL.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The cumulative count of file modifications since process tracking started. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.ingress_time Date
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.filemod_count

outputs.description: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.legacy True if the process document came from the legacy data stream (deprecated, use enriched). CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.modload_count
outputs.name: Unknown

outputs.description: The cumulative count of module loads since process tracking started. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.netconn_count The cumulative count of network connections since process tracking started.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The globally unique organization key. This will most likely be the PSC organization ID + PSC environment ID or some other unique token used across environments. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.parent_guid The process GUID of the parent process.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.org_id

outputs.description: The PID of the parent process. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_guid Unique ID of the solr document. Appears as process_guid + server-side timestamp in epoch ms (1/1/1970 based).
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.parent_pid

outputs.description: The MD5 and SHA-256 hashes of the process’s main module in a multi-valued field. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_name The tokenized file path of the process’s main module.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_hash

outputs.description: The PID of a process. Can be multi-valued in case of exec/fork on Linux/OSX. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_username User names related to the process.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.process_pid

outputs.description: The cumulative count of registry modifications since process tracking started. CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.scriptload_count The cumulative count of loaded scripts since process tracking started.
outputs.name: CarbonBlackEEDR.SearchProcess.results.regmod_count

outputs.description: Edit this page Report an Issue Previous
outputs.name: Note: If the API returns duplicates, the duplicates will be dropped, causing the total number of alerts fetched to potentially be fewer than the set limit. Moreover, if all of the alerts returned are duplicates, they will all be dropped, causing no alerts to be returned. In such cases, increase the limit.
